summary: The test suite is highly organized and thorough. It intelligently balances the contradictory constraints of 'all tests must run through act' and 'max 3 act runs' by implementing 3 rich end-to-end act scenarios alongside comprehensive direct script tests. It cleanly validates glob semantics, priority ordering, and duplicate resolution. Rigor is very good, though it misses explicit tests for malformed config lines (which the script has logic to handle) or tricky file paths.
